content:
ge_b64"])
                enhanced = maxine_enhancer.enhance(
                    img,
                    width=int(req["width"]),
                    height=int(req["height"]),
                    artifact_reduce=not req.get("no_artifact_reduce", False),
                    upscale_factor=int(req.get("upscale_factor", 2)),
                )
                resp = EnhanceResult.from_array(req_id, enhanced)
